parameters.query: SELECT json_build_object('total_cost_usd',(SELECT COALESCE(SUM(amount_usd),0) FROM bridge.expenses WHERE occurred_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours'),'ai_cost_usd',(SELECT COALESCE(SUM(amount_usd),0) FROM bridge.expenses WHERE occurred_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' AND (category ILIKE '%ai%' OR vendor ILIKE '%anthropic%' OR vendor ILIKE '%claude%' OR vendor ILIKE '%openai%' OR vendor ILIKE '%gemini%')),'total_revenue_usd',(SELECT COALESCE(SUM(invoice_total),0) FROM bridge.billing_records WHERE paid_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours'),'leads_24h',(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM bridge.leads WHERE created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours'),'demos_24h',(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM bridge.website_projects WHERE created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours'),'outreach_24h',(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM bridge.outreach_messages WHERE direction='outbound' AND sent_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours'),'invoices_paid_24h',(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM bridge.billing_records WHERE paid_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours'),'top_cost_drivers',(SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(c),'[]'::json) FROM (SELECT COALESCE(vendor,category,'unknown') AS vendor, ROUND(SUM(amount_usd),4)::numeric AS amount_usd, COUNT(*) AS tx_count FROM bridge.expenses WHERE occurred_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC LIMIT 5) c),'top_workflows',(SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(w),'[]'::json) FROM (SELECT workflow_name, COUNT(*) AS events FROM bridge.workflow_events WHERE created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC LIMIT 5) w)) AS kpi;
